description: Self-hosted Personal DevOps Workspace Platform for Ubuntu Desktop
completedTasks: Create all documentation files under docs/
Add unit tests for config, utils, workspace, engine
Implement Template domain model and Registry (internal/template)
Seed templates/ with kubernetes, docker, jenkins, linux, terraform, ansible definitions
Wire Engine.CreateWorkspace to resolve Services from a Template
Add unit tests for template.Registry; update engine tests
notes: cmd/devlab/main.go remains a minimal entrypoint; CLI wiring is not part of any completed sprint yet. Workspace persistence is JSON-on-disk (Sprint 1) — SQLite (internal/storage) arrives in Sprint 3. Engine intentionally does not expose Start/Stop/Reset yet (see ADR-0007); that is Sprint 10. engine.New now takes (*workspace.Manager, *template.Registry); CreateWorkspace takes (name, description, templateName) and resolves Services from the Template (see ADR-0008). Template Service entries are not yet validated against a service-type catalog (see ADR-0009) — internal/service does not exist until Sprint 7.
